signals.text: Bi-weekly connect held Apr 9 with Ngoc Ma and Paige Davis (Good Moose) - active engagement continues
Next bi-weekly scheduled for Apr 23 - consistent meeting cadence maintained
Low CVR discussed on Apr 9 call: 0.33% and 0.76% over last 30 days with limited ad traffic to FERMAT funnels
Video mismatch issue: UGC creator in ads doesn't match landing page video, causing drop-offs within first 3 seconds
A/B testing proposed using 50/50 split for video matching experiment with Ripe launch founder video
FERMAT funnel is highest scaled ad in Henry Rose's ad account per Jan 21 call
Paige Davis (Good Moose) ramping up on platform, has UX background - increasing funnel creation capacity

recent.title: Fermat x Henry Rose
recent.participants: Mia DyBuncio, Paige Davis (Good Moose), Remi Brixton, Ngoc Ma, Brittany Thoma, Allegra Miele
recent.summary: Platform walkthrough for Paige Davis who is taking over funnel creation. Covered cloning funnels, A/B experiments, and split testing. Clarified AI Search funnels are optimized for LLM crawlers (not human reading). Paige confirmed platform is intuitive. Upcoming product launch next month will need a new page.
action_items: Answer Slack questions during new page build
QA new funnel before it goes live

recent.title: Fermat x Henry Rose
recent.participants: Remi Brixton, Paige Davis, Mia DyBuncio, Brittany Toney, Ngoc Ma, Allegra Miele, Brittany Thoma
recent.summary: Addressed AI Search dashboard confusion around prompt-to-funnel mapping. Brittany requested more non-branded funnel suggestions. FERMAT funnel is highest scaled ad. Updated Dave video lander improving conversion rates (last 7 > last 14). Planned A/B test of video vs enhanced PDP. New product launch at end of March discussed.
action_items: Give product team feedback for better branded/non-branded funnel mix
Work with product designer to overhaul AI Search UI
Connect with Ngoc Ma offline on retention testing

recent.title: Fermat x Henry Rose
recent.participants: Mia DyBuncio, Ngoc Ma, Brittany Toney, Brittany Thoma, Remi Brixton, Allegra Miele
recent.summary: Regular bi-weekly check-in with Henry Rose team and Good Moose agency. Agency involvement confirmed with participants from goodmoose.co.

calls.analysis: Henry Rose maintains strong engagement with regular bi-weekly calls involving multiple stakeholders from the brand (Remi, Ngoc) and their agency Good Moose (Brittany Thoma, Paige Davis). Recent calls focused on platform training for new user Paige, AI Search optimization, and A/B testing strategy. The Apr 9 Granola meeting flagged low CVR (0.33-0.76%) and video mismatch issues that need addressing.

email.analysis: Active email engagement around Henry Rose bi-weekly connects. Ngoc Ma (Henry Rose) and Paige Davis (Good Moose) consistently accept meeting invitations. Brittany Toney (Good Moose) declined the Apr 9 call due to OOO. Glyphic call summaries are being generated post-meeting. The communication pattern is healthy and centered around the scheduled bi-weekly cadence.
